title: Pre-release consistency audit
changes: Added pre-release audit report under docs/reports/.
Updated go-no-go to reuse latest reports/intake_report.json when --state and --answers are omitted.
Updated validate-state state loading to accept helper reports with embedded state.
Added regression test for go-no-go reusing latest intake state.
Updated README, CHANGELOG, CLI docs and book Markdown only; PDF not regenerated.
known_limitations: go-no-go is a deterministic helper and does not execute an AI model.
Rendered artifact validation checks declared contract values and mappings, not arbitrary business semantics.
Project-specific production tests remain outside the Ordo helper layer.
